title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Samsung India Electronics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Samsung India Electronics
jsonLd.description:
We at Samsung India Electronics are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Samsung India Electronics:
Samsung India Electronics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics!
